tagline: Users can now chat with Databricks Assistant on some compute pages.
what_it_does: Users can now chat with Databricks Assistant on some compute pages. Use the Assistant chat panel to help you create a new compute resource, pool, and policy. Or, ask the Assistant questions about the compute resource, like “Is this compute resource Unity Catalog enabled?” or “What’s the current compute policy?” To learn more about chatting with the Assitant, see Tour of the Genie Code pane.
why_it_matters: Serverless compute On demand, automatically managed compute that scales based on your workload requirements.
plain_summary: Users can now chat with Databricks Assistant on some compute pages. Use the Assistant chat panel to help you create a new compute resource, pool, and policy.

capabilities.title: Interactive Python and SQL execution
capabilities.desc: Interactive Python and SQL execution in notebooks with automatic scaling and no infrastructure management.

capabilities.title: Run Lakeflow Jobs without configuring
capabilities.desc: Run Lakeflow Jobs without configuring or deploying infrastructure. Automatically provisions and scales compute resources.

use_cases: Optimized compute for SQL queries, analytics, and business intelligence workloads with serverless or classic options.
Understanding the differences between serverless and classic SQL warehouse options to choose the right type for your workloads.
key_takeaway: Users can now chat with Databricks Assistant on some compute pages.
